home.subtitle: THE SHADOW GAME
home.intro: Sign your name, pick an avatar, and enter a private room.

start.title: Start
start.paperIntro: Join an existing room or host a new one.
start.createDescription: You will enter the lobby as host

room.title: Room
room.lobbyHint: Waiting for the host. When ready, the host starts the game to deal words.
room.notFound: This room does not exist or is no longer available.
room.joinFailed: Could not join the room. Try again later.
room.dealHint: Do not reveal your word. Speaking and voting will ship in a later iteration.
